Title: USV Transit Speed
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall achieve a sustained transit speed of not less than 10 knots in sea states up to and including Sea State 4 (significant wave height Hs ≤ 2.5 m).

Title: ROV Operating Depth
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall deploy the ROV to a maximum operating depth of 1000 m below mean sea level.

Title: LARS Sea State Operational Limit
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall complete ROV launch and recovery operations via the stern-ramp LARS in sea states up to and including Sea State 4 (significant wave height Hs ≤ 2.5 m).

Title: Communications Loss Hold and Return-to-Home Response
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall, upon detection of a loss of the ROC communications link lasting more than 120 seconds, autonomously command the USV to maintain station and the ROV to hold depth, and shall initiate a return-to-surface and return-to-home sequence for both vehicles if the link is not restored within a further operator-configurable timeout period of between 5 and 60 minutes.

Title: COLREGS-Compliant Collision Avoidance Detection Range
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall detect surface vessels and stationary obstacles at a minimum range of 2000 m and shall initiate a COLREGS-compliant avoidance manoeuvre with sufficient time to avoid collision at the USV's maximum transit speed.

Title: Onboard Edge Processing Compression for Satellite Uplink
Description: The Offshore Survey USV-ROV shall compress and prioritise combined ROV video and sonar payload data to a total uplink data rate not exceeding 50 Mbps before transmission to the ROC via the satellite link.

Title: LARS Winch Rated Safe Working Load
Description: The Launch & Recovery System shall provide a winch with a minimum rated safe working load of 275 kg in air, sufficient to handle the maximum ROV handling mass with a minimum safety factor of 1.1 applied.

Title: LARS Motion Compensation Residual Velocity Limit
Description: The Launch & Recovery System shall limit the residual vertical velocity of the ROV at the point of water entry or exit to no more than 0.5 m/s relative to the sea surface, when operating in sea states up to and including Sea State 4 (Hs ≤ 2.5 m).

Title: Tether Management System Minimum Usable Tether Length
Description: The Launch & Recovery System tether management system shall store and deploy a minimum of 1200 m of fibre-optic management tether without inducing tether twist, kinking, or bend radius violations below the tether manufacturer's minimum bend radius specification.
